title: Assist with care and maintenance of medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with care and maintenance of medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for medicinal cannabis care and maintenance tasks

pcs.text: Identify and confirm plant care and maintenance tasks, workplace procedures and specifications with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm plant care and maintenance tasks, workplace procedures and specifications with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm plant care and maintenance tasks, workplace procedures and specifications with supervisor.

pcs.text: Recognise health and safety hazards, and report safety concerns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise health and safety hazards, and report safety concerns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise health and safety hazards, and report safety concerns.

pcs.text: Collect required tools, equipment and materials for the task, and check for approval and functionality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect required tools, equipment and materials for the task, and check for approval and functionality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect required tools, equipment and materials for the task, and check for approval and functionality.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment according to health and safety and hygiene requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to health and safety and hygiene requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to health and safety and hygiene requirements.

pcs.text: Apply personal hygiene and tool and equipment sanitation procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply personal hygiene and tool and equipment sanitation procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply personal hygiene and tool and equipment sanitation procedures.

pcs.text: Check cultivation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check cultivation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check cultivation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for medicinal cannabis care and maintenance tasks

elements.title: Assist with maintaining plants

pcs.text: Identify and inspect medicinal cannabis plants, including mother plants, to be maintained, and confirm quantity and weights with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and inspect medicinal cannabis plants, including mother plants, to be maintained, and confirm quantity and weights with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and inspect medicinal cannabis plants, including mother plants, to be maintained, and confirm quantity and weights with supervisor.

pcs.text: Assist with trimming and training tasks according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with trimming and training tasks according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with trimming and training tasks according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Use tools and equipment safely and cautiously around growing systems while maintaining plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use tools and equipment safely and cautiously around growing systems while maintaining plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use tools and equipment safely and cautiously around growing systems while maintaining plants.

pcs.text: Assist with repotting tasks, using required techniques for growing media used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with repotting tasks, using required techniques for growing media used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with repotting tasks, using required techniques for growing media used.

pcs.text: Assist with water and nutrient requirements following trimming and repotting tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with water and nutrient requirements following trimming and repotting tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with water and nutrient requirements following trimming and repotting tasks.

pcs.text: Use safe practices to transfer pots between vegetative and flowering cultivation areas, ensuring areas are clear of waste before moving plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safe practices to transfer pots between vegetative and flowering cultivation areas, ensuring areas are clear of waste before moving plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe practices to transfer pots between vegetative and flowering cultivation areas, ensuring areas are clear of waste before moving plants.

pcs.text: Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assist with maintaining plants

elements.title: Assist with monitoring plant health and climate conditions during vegetative and flowering stages

pcs.text: Confirm quantity and weights of plants to be monitored with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm quantity and weights of plants to be monitored with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm quantity and weights of plants to be monitored with supervisor.

pcs.text: Assist with monitoring plant health according to monitoring schedule, and report abnormalities as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with monitoring plant health according to monitoring schedule, and report abnormalities as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with monitoring plant health according to monitoring schedule, and report abnormalities as required.

pcs.text: Check for signs of disease or pests, and report presence or potential of disease or pests as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for signs of disease or pests, and report presence or potential of disease or pests as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for signs of disease or pests, and report presence or potential of disease or pests as required.

pcs.text: Assist with monitoring water and nutrient and climate control levels according to specifications, and report levels that are out of acceptable range
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with monitoring water and nutrient and climate control levels according to specifications, and report levels that are out of acceptable range?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with monitoring water and nutrient and climate control levels according to specifications, and report levels that are out of acceptable range.

pcs.text: Assist with monitoring growth, health and climate conditions for mother plants to ensure that they remain in a vegetative stage, and report abnormalities as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with monitoring growth, health and climate conditions for mother plants to ensure that they remain in a vegetative stage, and report abnormalities as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with monitoring growth, health and climate conditions for mother plants to ensure that they remain in a vegetative stage, and report abnormalities as required.

pcs.text: Keep growing system clean and free from plant waste at all times
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Keep growing system clean and free from plant waste at all times?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep growing system clean and free from plant waste at all times.

pcs.text: Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Assist with monitoring plant health and climate conditions during vegetative and flowering stages

elements.title: Clean up after care and maintenance tasks

pcs.text: Clean and sanitise cultivation work area before safely leaving secured area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and sanitise cultivation work area before safely leaving secured area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and sanitise cultivation work area before safely leaving secured area.

pcs.text: Weigh, record and place plant waste in designated containers according to workplace and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weigh, record and place plant waste in designated containers according to workplace and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh, record and place plant waste in designated containers according to workplace and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Dispose of material waste safely according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of material waste safely according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of material waste safely according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check, clean and sanitise and store tools and equipment, reporting identified repair requirements to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check, clean and sanitise and store tools and equipment, reporting identified repair requirements to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check, clean and sanitise and store tools and equipment, reporting identified repair requirements to supervisor.
